description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these Tweed socks from the timberland Earthkeepers' collection. Made of organic material for the environment-friendly, these socks can be worn both - when at work and when on a casual outing - with much ease and comfort.Made of 77% organic cotton, 18% polyester, 3% nylon and 2% elastane for all-day comfort stretchCreated using rugged heathered yarns with contrast colour tipping at the heel, toe and tip for absolute comfort and styleRib knit with cushioning and midfoot arch support for superior comfort and durabilityEmbroidered brand logo near the mouthsock careMachine wash warm in not more than 40 degrees Do not use softeners Tumble dry low Do not dry clean Do not iron
